description: Character Parenters are a component that allow for parenting or aligning the gravity of a user when they hit a collider.

fields.TriggersOnly: Whether to only allow trigger colliders that are part of this component's slot hierarchy to activate parenting.
fields.NestIntoSpace: Parent the user into the slot ``ParentSpace`` or not.
fields.MustBeOnGround: The user must be on the ground according to the character controller before they will be aligned/parented.
fields.Filters: What directions a user must be aligned to relative to the slot this component is on for them to get parented.
fields.IgnoreParentUser: Ignore the active user of this component when attempting to parent a user.
fields.ParentSpace: The coordinate space that calculations should be done in.

notes.title: Behavior
notes.text:
Disabling the collider the CharacterParenter is connected to might be preferred compared to disabling the slot or the CharacterParenter's enabled state itself, as disabling the collider will throw a ContactEnd event to the CharacterPareneter and correctly de-parent the user's inside. 

Disabling the CharacterParenter itself while users are inside the ParentSpace will mean the component can't de-parent users correctly and might not be wanted behavior.
